reviewsData.testimonial: What I love about juhu is its perfect blend of luxury and convenience. The beautiful beach, vibrant nightlife, and upscale amenities make it an ideal place to live. Despite the occasional traffic, the area feels safe and welcoming, with a proactive community and responsible local police. it's a cosmopolitan neighborhood that offers a serene environment admist the bustling city life.
reviewsData.negativeTestimonial: The traffic in Juhu can be a bit bothersome, and there's occasional petty crimes near the beach. However, these are minor issues compared to the overall charm of the neighbourhood.

localityVideoInfo.name: Juhu
localityVideoInfo.description: Juhu is one of the most desirable neighborhoods of Mumbai, Maharashtra. Juhu has a long coastline and beach along the Arabian Sea. The pin code of Juhu is 400049 and the postal head office is Juhu. Theosophical Housing Colony, Juhu Tara Road, Uditi Tarang Housing Colony, Shivkunj, Vallabh Nagar Society are the nearby localities to Juhu. Juhu is located on the western side of Mumbai and has good connectivity to all the major localities via roadways, railways, and through metro service as well. Marathi is the local language here, however; people also speak and understand Hindi and Punjabi as well. The locality is one of the posh areas of Mumbai and has many commercial companies in the area. Juhu is a famous tourist spot because of the Juhu beach and thousands of tourists come to this beach on a daily basis. The street shopping here is well known for low prices and good variety. Juhu receives 24 hours water supply from the BMC (Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation). Many of the famous tourist spots like Gateway of India, Marine drive, Tarapur Aquarium are quite near to this locality.

name: "Juhu has all modes of public transportation ranging from government buses, local railways, and metro service as well

"Andheri railway station is quite near to the locality at a distance of 3.1 km
"The buses and local trains are quite crowded at any given point in time
"Juhu has one of the best road infrastructures with many flyovers
"There are speed breakers at many major intersections in the locality
"The roads are well maintained and there is no litter on the roads
"Service roads in the Juhu region do not see many congestions
Andheri metro station is quite nearby to Juhu at a driving distance
"The Mumbai International Airport is quite near to Juhu at a distance of 4.8 km
"The airport can be reached within 15-20 mins by road
"Juhu has many good schools within a walking distance making it easy for the kids
CP Goenka International School is well known for its academic records
"Ecole Mondiale World School has an attendance of over 5000 children
Sarla Hospital has the neuro department in Mumbai and has the most ICU beds
"KLS Memorial Hospital is specialized in child health care and fracture cases as well
The Juhu Market is well known for its fresh groceries and fish market
Day to day essentials can be easily obtained from the local departmental stores
"Prime Mall is the go-to place for all the local people for clothing and electronics shopping
DB mall has a big theatre and a food court situated on the top floor
"Hotel Airport International is a 5-star hotel and is most chosen by the tourist
For all the fish lovers and a sea view room, Hotel Sea Sands is the perfect choice
"Juhu Beach is a famous tourist place and more than 1000 people visit this place daily
The Tarapur aquarium is quite famous for the fishes and different types of aquatic species

Juhu has low crime rate since the past few years

There are good sitting arrangements in these parks for the adults

Juhu doesn’t have much pollution as there are trees on either side of the road
"Juhu receives 24 hours of water supply from the BMC
"Water can be directly drank from the tap due to its cleanliness
"Juhu doesn’t experience load shedding for a very long time
"The area around Juhu has not witnessed any encroachment activities
The Juhu beach is being cleaned up with the construction of some public washrooms
There are good footpaths for people to walk near the beach area
"The residential prices of Juhu were not at all affected by covid
"The rental prices of the flats are increasing at 5% every year
The MIDC office of Andheri is nearby to the locality
The Times of India office is quite near to the locality which increases the property value
"Western Express Highway passes very much close to the locality
SV Road goes through the Juhu locality and connects directly to Bandra
"Juhu is seeing many more commercial buildings in the near future
Rs. 50,000 to Rs. 1 lakh for 3 BHK flat arrangement

Only a select few hospitals have ambulance support in Juhu
There is a parking problem in many of the malls and most gets full on weekends

newsArticles.title: Top 20 expensive Bollywood celebrity homes that redefine luxury living
newsArticles.mainText: Take a look at the most expensive houses owned by celebrities in Mumbai.

newsArticles.title: Jalsa: Inside Rs 100-cr Amitabh Bachchan house
newsArticles.mainText: In addition to Jalsa, Amitabh Bachchan has invested in properties in India.

newsArticles.title: Katrina Kaif and Vicky Kaushal house: A peek inside their Mumbai home
newsArticles.mainText: Vicky Kaushal house that he shares with wife Katrina Kaif is located in Juhu.

newsArticles.title: Sonakshi Sinha house: About the actor’s homes in Juhu and Bandra
newsArticles.mainText: The top floor of the Juhu Bungalow 'Ramayan' is where the actress stayed before her marriage to Zaheer Iqbal.

newsArticles.title: Priyanka Chopra’s house: Classy, luxurious and yet, warm
newsArticles.mainText: Priyanka Chopra’s $20 million mansion in Encino, Los Angeles, has seven bedrooms along with a massive outdoor zone, an infinity pool and a backyard with stunning views of the city

newsArticles.title: Popular celebrity homes in Mumbai’s Juhu and Bandra
newsArticles.mainText: Some of the popular celebrities who own luxurious property in Juhu and Bandra localities include Amitabh Bachchan, Shah Rukh Khan, Ajay Devgn and Kajol and Amir Khan.

newsArticles.title: Inside Rajkummar Rao’s house and luxurious triplex in Mumbai
newsArticles.mainText: Get a sneak peek into Bollywood actor Rajkummar Rao’s apartment in Mumbai. The actor and his wife recently purchased Janhvi Kapoor’s luxurious triplex for Rs 44 crore in Mumbai’s Juhu.

newsArticles.title: Top 10 residential areas in Mumbai’s western suburbs
newsArticles.mainText: In this guide, we tell you the top residential real estate locations to invest in the Western suburbs of Mumbai.

newsArticles.title: Mhada Mumbai Lottery 2024 to be announced soon; unit prices under PMAY may see revision
newsArticles.mainText: The unit project price in units offered in Goregoan  under the PMAY are is set to be increased by a substantial Rs 4 lakh.

newsArticles.title: Varun Dhawan’s house: Abundantly luxurious with a minimalistic décor
newsArticles.mainText: Varun Dhawan’s lavish apartment in Juhu comes with its own mini gymnasium, a plush living room, a workstation and a walk-in closet for the luxurious bedroom and has been designed by his mother, Karuna Dhawan

newsArticles.title: Akshay Kumar plans to buy childhood home his family rented for Rs 500
newsArticles.mainText: The actor plans to purchase the third floor of the house where he used to stay with his family.

newsArticles.title: Kajol and Ajay Devgn house: A peek inside the actor couple's Mumbai home
newsArticles.mainText: Check the inside pictures of Kajol -Ajay Devgan house in Juhu which is named as Shivshakti.

details.name: 2.5 BHK Flat in , Juhu for rent - Mumbai | Housing.com
details.title: 2.5 BHK Flat
details.galleryTitle: 2.5 BHK Flat in , Juhu for rent - Mumbai | Housing.com

address.address: Ideal 49, Airport Area, Juhu, Mumbai South West, Mumbai

description.overviewDescription:
Your search for a spacious home at affordable rent in Mumbai ends here. The 3 BHK property offers a serene environment with excellent views of the city. This Flat is equipped with the latest lifestyle amenities and all the conveniences at the doorstep. It is semi furnished Flat. This unit is built on floor 5 out of a total 12 floors. The Flat has been thoughtfully designed to meet a family’s space needs, with 3 bedrooms. It includes 2 bathroom. There are 0 balcony that lets you enjoy scenic views. The built-up area of this Flat is 900 square_feet. The carpet area is 890 square_feet. Residents need to pay a monthly rent of Rs 185000. The security deposit payable is Rs 550000.

Project Highlights

The Flat is in proximity to major landmarks in Mumbai. Families of this Flat have easy access to healthcare centres when they need medical assistance, especially in emergencies. They include Nanavati Max Hospital, Mumbai, Surya Hospitals, Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital and Medical Research Institute
